features: ASSORTED SIZED FOR VERSATILITY: This pack contains two pairs of scissors in varied sizes, catering to different cutting needs, whether it's crafting, kitchen use, or any general task requiring precision.

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Each pair in our pack of comfort grip scissors is crafted with high-grade stainless steel blades. The ergonomic rubber handles provide a comfortable grip for extended use without strain.
ERGONOMIC COMFORT GRIP HANDLES: Designed with user comfort in mind, these scissors feature rubberized handles that offer a non-slip grip, reducing hand fatigue for extended use in home projects.
MULTIPURPOSE HOME ESSENTIAL: Ideal for an array of home uses, from crafting and sewing projects to kitchen tasks and general household cutting needs, these scissors are a must-have in every home.

VERSATILE & PRACTICAL: These scissors are not limited to just cutting paper or fabric. They can also work on various materials, such as cardboard, plastic packaging, twine, and more. This makes them an invaluable tool for any task or project.
